entries._AXUIElementCreateInternal: Creates AXUIElement with PID (arg0), element ID (arg1), CFData (arg2), flags (arg3). Stores at offsets 0x10, 0x30, 0x20, 0x14 respectively.
entries._AXUIElementGetData: Extracts internal data: element[0x4] → data pointer, element[0x6] → element ID
entries._AXUIElementRemoteTokenCreate: Creates serializable token from element: bytes at 0x10, 0x14, 0x18 + CFData at 0x4
